description_long: This is a heavily weathered blue metal barrel, showing significant dents, rust, and surface wear. The barrel is cylindrical but has been deformed, with a pronounced inward collapse on one side and a slanted, partially caved-in top. Patches of rust and grime are visible, especially around the seams and damaged areas, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure. There are remnants of white labels or stickers on the side, though they are faded and partially torn. The barrel sits on a section of cracked, gray pavement, suggesting it has been left in an urban or industrial environment. A black strap or handle is attached to one side, possibly for moving or securing the barrel.
description: A battered blue metal barrel with heavy rust, dents, and faded labels, sitting on cracked pavement. The top is slanted and partially caved in, with a black strap attached to one side.
description_view_0: Front view shows the most damaged side with a large dent, faded white labels, and a black strap attached.
description_view_1: This side displays a less damaged, mostly blue surface with visible grime and no labels or straps.
description_view_2: The back view highlights the deep inward collapse and rust streaks, with the top appearing most deformed.
description_view_3: This view shows the rustiest side, with the top slant and caved-in area most prominent, and no visible labels.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
